[2026-06-17] 这个插件是干嘛的通过 rclone WebDAV 暴露 Cloud CLI 文件系统，支持远程挂载
[2026-06-26] 排查以下当前ai阅卷的功能为什么是损坏的？https://code.alibaba-inc.com/OneDayAI-RPUKYRO/1BfrYn9G/tree/onedaybot-dev
[2026-06-16] /qwen3.7-max
[2026-06-16] 我想做一个图片文字计数功能的浏览器插件，支持按“2英/2数=1汉字”规则自动统计，替代人工清点以提升作业效率，并且文字使用ocr+视觉模型双重校对，算术部分全部使用脚本计算，不让任何模型进行数学运算。视觉模型需要先识别电商商品图片中的主要商品或者物品，用遮罩遮住商品的主体再做文字识别，因为要排除商品本身标签、商品身上带的字。给出完整的搭建计划。
[2026-06-16] 867b3120-d0d0-4078-9665-0121e6b8eeb4.zip解析这个文件中的ocr
[2026-06-17] 视觉模型使用idelab的api获取，初次使用需要设置个人ak，通用接口：https://idealab.alibaba-inc.com/api/anthropic
[2026-06-17] This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   User wants a Chrome/Edge browser extension for counting text in e-commerce product images. Core requirements:
   - Counting rule: 2 English letters or 2 digits = 1 Chinese character equivalent
   - OCR + vision model dual verification (arithmetic done purely by JS, never by AI)
   - Vision model identifies product主体, masks it, then OCR excludes product labels/text
   - Use IdeaLab API (https://idealab.alibaba-inc.com/api/anthropic) for vision model
   - Default model: Qwen3.6-Plus-DogFooding
   - Internal OCR via pixelator API (no key needed)
   - Parallel pipeline execution for speed
   - Persistent sidepanel (doesn't close when clicking other pages)
   - History of analysis results saved persistently
   - Push code to https://code.alibaba-inc.com/xtool/shizi
   - Most recently: test the product detection prompt with qwen3.6-plus on a specific screenshot showing a white freezer cabinet, where the model was incorrectly detecting edge text labels instead of the main product

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Chrome Extension Manifest V3
   - Service Worker with ESM modules
   - chrome.sidePanel API (requires user gesture for .open())
   - Anthropic Messages API format (x-api-key header, /v1/messages endpoint)
   - OpenAI compatible chat/completions format
   - Internal pixelator OCR API: POST /tools/upload (multipart) → CDN URL → POST /tools/ocr {image_url} → full text results
   - Promise.all for parallel detect + OCR execution
   - Coordinate-based filtering (pixel bbox normalized by imageSize vs percentage-based product regions)
   - Canvas-based thumbnail compression (200px wide JPEG quality=0.3, ~3-5KB per entry)
   - chrome.storage.local for settings and history (5MB limit, max 50 history items)
   - Debounced auto-save (300ms) for settings
   - Vite 8 + esbuild for building (CRXJS incompatible with Vite 8)
   - Git push via HTTPS with token from ~/.config/a1/auth.yaml

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - `src/background/vision-adapter.ts`
     - Core vision API adapter supporting both Anthropic (IdeaLab) and OpenAI formats
     - Contains DETECT_PRODUCT_PROMPT and VERIFY_OCR_PROMPT_TEMPLATE
     - Recently updated prompt to better identify product主体:
     ```typescript
     const DETECT_PRODUCT_PROMPT = `请分析这张电商商品图片，识别画面中唯一的商品主体区域。

     重要提示：
     1. 商品主体是图片中最大、最显眼的那个实体物品，通常位于图片中心位置
     2. 不要识别文字、标签、横幅、水印、背景装饰等非商品元素
     3. 如果图片中有多件商品，只识别最大的那件
     4. 如果图片中的文字/标签就是商品本身（如书籍封面、T恤印花），则需要识别

     要求：
     1. 只返回一个 JSON 数组，包含一个 bounding box 对象
     2. 格式: [{"x": number, "y": number, "width": number, "height": number, "label": string}]
     3. x, y, width, height 为相对于图片尺寸的百分比值 (0.0 ~ 1.0)
     4. label 为商品简要描述（如"保鲜柜","连衣裙","手机"）
     5. 如果图中没有明确商品，返回空数组 []
     6. 只返回 JSON，不要任何其他文字`;
     ```
     - Post-processing sorts by area and keeps only largest bbox:
     ```typescript
     .sort((a: any, b: any) => b.width * b.height - a.width * a.height)
     .slice(0, 1);
     ```

   - `src/background/orchestrator.ts`
     - Parallel pipeline: Promise.all([detectProductRegion, recognizeWithInternalApi])
     - filterByRegion function: normalizes OCR pixel coords by imageSize, checks if center point falls within product region (with 5% expand)
     - Removed mask-composer dependency entirely

   - `src/background/ocr-internal.ts`
     - Uses pixelator /tools/upload (multipart FormData) → /tools/ocr
     - Returns OcrRawResult { results: OcrResult[], imageSize: [number, number] | null }
     - No API key required

   - `src/background/index.ts`
     - Message router handling: getSettings, saveSettings, testVisionConnection, openSidePanel, getHistory, deleteHistory, clearHistory, runPipeline
     - Pipeline completion auto-saves to history with thumbnail from UI side
     - Removed createThumbnail function (moved to UI side)

   - `src/popup/App.tsx`
     - Simplified to button that calls chrome.sidePanel.open() in onClick handler (user gesture requirement)
     - Detects chrome://, edge:// etc. unsupported pages
     ```typescript
     const handleOpen = async () => {
       const [tab] = await chrome.tabs.query({ active: true, currentWindow: true });
       // ... validation ...
       await chrome.sidePanel.open({ tabId: tab.id });
     };
     ```

   - `src/sidepanel/SidePanelApp.tsx`
     - Main UI with three tabs: analyze, history, settings
     - createCompressedThumbnail function using Canvas (200px wide, JPEG quality 0.3)
     - Sends thumbnail along with imageData in runPipeline message

   - `src/sidepanel/HistoryTab.tsx`
     - Displays history items with thumbnails, equivalent count, category breakdown, timestamp
     - Supports view detail, delete single, clear all

   - `src/popup/SettingsPage.tsx`
     - Auto-save with 300ms debounce
     - Separate isCustomModel state to prevent select/input bounce bug
     - PRESET_MODELS array for detecting custom vs preset models
     - Default model: Qwen3.6-Plus-DogFooding
     - Base URL: https://idealab.alibaba-inc.com/api/anthropic

   - `src/shared/types.ts`
     - HistoryItem type with id, timestamp, thumbnail, result
     - ChromeMessage union includes runPipeline with optional thumbnail field
     - PipelineProgress step no longer includes 'mask'

   - `src/shared/storage.ts`
     - loadHistory, saveHistoryItem (max 50), deleteHistoryItem, clearHistory

   - `build.mjs`
     - Step 1: Vite builds popup + sidepanel HTML pages
     - Step 2: esbuild bundles background service worker as ESM
     - Step 3: Copies icons
     - Step 4: Writes manifest.json with correct paths

   - `tests/counter.test.ts` - 16 unit tests for classifyChar, countChars, calculateEquivalentCount (all passing)

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **CRXJS incompatible with Vite 8**: Replaced with custom build.mjs using Vite for UI + esbuild for background SW
   - **Settings lost on popup close**: Added debounced auto-save to chrome.storage.local
   - **Custom model input bouncing**: Separated isCustomModel boolean state from settings.vision.model value
   - **OCR V2 "missing keywords" error**: Discovered /ocr/locate and tppdebug V2 are keyword-locate APIs, not full-text. Found /tools/upload + /tools/ocr via OpenAPI spec at pre-pixelator-evaluation.alibaba-inc.com/openapi.json
   - **sidePanel.open() not working from popup**: First attempt used sendMessage to background (sender.tab was null). Second attempt used useEffect (async, not user gesture). Final fix: button onClick handler calling sidePanel.open() directly in sync call stack
   - **History thumbnails exceeding 5MB quota**: Changed from background truncating base64 to 50KB to UI-side Canvas compression producing ~3-5KB JPEG thumbnails
   - **chrome:// pages crash**: Added UNSUPPORTED_PREFIXES check with user-friendly message
   - **Three-model review agents failing**: All sonnet agents returned 402 quota exceeded. Performed manual review in current session instead
   - **Product detection identifying edge text instead of main product**: Rewrote DETECT_PRODUCT_PROMPT and added area-based post-filtering. Currently being tested.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Solved OCR API discovery by reading OpenAPI spec from pixelator service
   - Solved sidepanel user gesture requirement through iterative debugging
   - Solved storage quota risk with Canvas-based thumbnail compression
   - Currently troubleshooting: product主体 detection accuracy - the model detects text labels around edges instead of the central white freezer cabinet in the test screenshot

[2026-06-17] 现在已经整个重启过了
[2026-06-17] This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Extract code related to 1D cloud storage bucket file upload and frontend display from Alibaba internal repo OneDayAI-RNHTYLI/1BSoUUzD (branch onedaybot-dev)
   - Install and configure agentfw (AI agent firewall) from https://github.com/openguardrails/agentfw
   - Configure 4 models (qwen3.7-max, Kimi-k2.6, GLM-5.1, deepseek-v4-pro) to be FUSED together (not failover, not best-of-N) — meaning all models called in parallel, answers synthesized by a judge model that identifies consensus, lists differences, and excludes wrong answers
   - Make the fusion model selectable via `/model` command within Claude Code sessions
   - User explicitly rejected "select best output" approach, wanting true deliberation/synthesis

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - 1D Cloud Storage: Uses `@ali/oneday-frontend-sdk` creating Supabase-compatible client, storage bucket `resume-pdfs`, public URL format `https://oneday-sbproxy.alibaba-inc.com/{projectId}/storage/v1/object/public/resume-pdfs/{path}`
   - agentfw: Local AI agent firewall/proxy, npm package `@openguardrails/agentfw`, daemon on port 9877, failover chain routing
   - OpenRouter Fusion: Multi-model deliberation API (`openrouter/fusion`), region-blocked from China IPs
   - Mixture of Agents (MoA): Research paradigm where multiple LLMs answer independently, then a judge/synthesizer combines results
   - aone-cloud-cli: Internal Alibaba tool with local-ducky binary proxy on port 58597, cloud-cli Node.js server managed by supervisord
   - Smart Proxy: Custom Python reverse proxy that routes requests based on model name
   - Supervisord: Process manager that starts cloud-cli, inherits environment at spawn time (doesn't re-read env files on child restart)

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - `/home/admin/workspace/fusion-server/fusion_server.py` — **Core local Fusion Server**
     - Implements multi-model deliberation: parallel calls to 4 worker models via Anthropic Messages API, then judge model synthesizes
     - Supports both OpenAI Chat Completions API (`/v1/chat/completions`) and Anthropic Messages API (`/v1/messages`)
     - Worker models: qwen3.7-max, Kimi-k2.6, GLM-5.1, deepseek-v4-pro; Judge: qwen3.7-max
     - All calls go through local proxy at `http://127.0.0.1:58597/v1/anthropic`
     - JUDGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT instructs: consensus first, list disagreements, exclude errors, tag sources
     - Runs on port 8899

   - `/home/admin/workspace/fusion-server/smart_proxy.py` — **Smart routing proxy on port 58598**
     - Intercepts all Anthropic Messages API requests
     - Routes model="fusion" OR model="qwen3.6-plus" → Fusion Server (localhost:8899)
     - Routes all other models → local-ducky (127.0.0.1:58597/v1/anthropic)
     - Key routing logic:
     ```python
     if model in ("fusion", "qwen3.6-plus"):
         target_url = FUSION_URL + "/v1/messages"
     else:
         target_url = DUCKY_URL + self.path
     ```

   - `/opt/cloudcli/app/shared/modelConstants.js` — **Model definitions for aone-cloud-cli**
     - Replaced `qwen3.6-plus` label with "Fusion (4模型综合审议)" while keeping value as "qwen3.6-plus"
     - Both CLAUDE_MODELS.OPTIONS and ALL_CHAT_MODELS updated
     - This is the file that controls what appears in `/model` picker

   - `/opt/cloudcli/app/server/claude-sdk.js` — **Claude SDK model routing** (~line 1592)
     - Added fusion-specific routing block:
     ```javascript
     } else if (sdkOptions.model === 'fusion') {
       console.log(`[model-routing] model="fusion" → routing to local Fusion Server (localhost:8899)`);
       process.env.ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:8899';
       process.env.ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN = 'fusion-local';
     } else {
     ```

   - `/etc/profile.d/pouchenv.sh` — **System-level environment variables**
     - Changed line 16 from `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="http://127.0.0.1:58597/v1/anthropic"` to `"http://127.0.0.1:58598/v1/anthropic"`
     - Required sudo to edit

   - `~/.zshrc` — **Shell configuration**
     - Line 113: Changed ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL to 58598
     - Added agentfw global config block with auto-start for Fusion Server, Smart Proxy, and agentfw daemon
     - Added `alias claude='agentfw claude'`

   - `~/.agentfw/models.json` — **agentfw model registry**
     - Providers: local-proxy (58597), openrouter (blocked), local-fusion (8899), claude-code/* (seeded)
     - Models include: qwen3.7-max, Kimi-k2.6, GLM-5.1, deepseek-v4-pro, fusion, plus seeded Claude models

   - `~/.agentfw/routing.json` — **agentfw routing config**
     - Chain: fusion → qwen3.7-max → Kimi-k2.6 → GLM-5.1 → deepseek-v4-pro

4. Errors and Fixes:
   - **OpenRouter 403 region blocked**: China IP (106.11.32.72, Alibaba Zhangjiakou) blocked by OpenRouter. Fix: Built local Fusion Server instead.
   - **`/model fusion` returns "model not found"**: local-ducky binary doesn't know "fusion" model name. Fix attempt 1: Added fusion to modelConstants.js + claude-sdk.js routing. Failed because /model validation goes directly to ducky, bypassing claude-sdk.js routing. Fix attempt 2: Created Smart Proxy on 58598 to intercept before ducky. Fix attempt 3: Reused existing "qwen3.6-plus" name (which ducky knows) but relabeled as Fusion.
   - **Smart Proxy keeps dying**: Port 58598 gets stuck occupied. Fix: Use `fuser -k 58598/tcp` to force-kill, then restart.
   - **ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL not updating in running processes**: supervisord spawns cloud-cli with inherited env vars; changing .zshrc/pouchenv.sh doesn't affect already-running processes. Fix: Need to kill entire supervisord tree and restart. Multiple attempts timed out (exit code 144).
   - **`.zshrc` had stale ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL**: Sandbox init script wrote line 113 with old value 58597, separate from our agentfw config block. Fix: Used `sed -i` with replace_all to fix all occurrences.
   - **User feedback on fusion concept**: User explicitly corrected me that fusion is NOT "select best output" (best-of-N) but rather "synthesize all answers, include consensus + unique points from each model, judge disagreements, exclude wrong answers." This led to building custom Fusion Server instead of using TensorZero's Mixture-of-N.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Successfully extracted 1D cloud storage upload code from internal repo
   - Successfully installed and configured agentfw with 4 models
   - Successfully built local Fusion Server that does true multi-model deliberation (tested and working)
   - Successfully created Smart Proxy for request routing
   - ONGOING: Getting `/model qwen3.6-plus` in Claude Code to actually route through Smart Proxy → Fusion Server. The cloud-cli server process environment variable ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL remains stuck at 58597 despite file changes. Full supervisord restart needed but has been problematic (timeouts). User says they've now done a full restart.

6. All User Messages:
   - "这个仓库里把给1d云储存桶上传文件并展示在前端页面的代码扒除了" (extract 1D cloud storage upload code)
   - "Continue from where you left off."
   - "https://github.com/openguardrails/agentfw 安装这个"
   - "配置，我怎么用？" (configure, how do I use it?)
   - Selected "Claude Code (推荐)" and "当前环境有很多模型"
   - "要全局配置，并且合成4个模型，不是一个模型" (global config, fuse 4 models not one)
   - "qwen3.7-max、Kimi-k2.6、GLM-5.1、deepseek-v4-pro这些都可以合成"
   - Selected "都走同一个本地代理" and "不是可以将模型融合吗？"
   - OpenRouter Fusion blog + DRACO paper links asking about usage
   - "怎么不用OpenRouter来融合？" (why not use OpenRouter for fusion?)
   - Provided OpenRouter API key
   - "免费额度有多少？" (how much free quota?)
   - "fusion 都配了什么模型？" (what models does fusion use?)

   - "解决一下网络环境问题，或者还有没有什么其他的能将模型同时调用的本地替代方案？"
   - "但并不是选最优输出，而是将所有模型的答案做综合，包含所有相同点+每个模型提到的不同点，对不同点进行判断，排除绝对错误答案" (NOT best-of-N, but synthesize all answers)
   - "我怎么切换到这个模型？" (how to switch to this model?)
   - "当前模型配置不还是qwen3.7-max吗？" (isn't the config still qwen3.7-max?)
   - "我怎么手动切换？" (how to manually switch?)
   - "我怎么在会话中切换？" (how to switch within a session?)
   - `/model fusion` → API error 400 model not found
   - "不能配置为本地代理认识的吗" (can't we make the local proxy recognize it?)
   - "新会话还是错误" (new session still errors)
   - "现在好了吗" (is it working now?)
   - "又开了一个新会话...并没有显示4个模型的审计信息" (opened new session, no 4-model deliberation shown)
   - "重启有效了吗" (did the restart work?)
   - "你好？" (hello?)
   - "当前的终端模式和实际的终端运行应该是两个东西，你看一下" (current terminal mode and actual terminal should be different things, check)
   - "做一个保活代理" (make a keepalive proxy)
   - Pasted new session output showing qwen3.6-plus responding without fusion deliberation
   - "我已经整个重启过了" (I've already done a full restart)

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Verify that after the user's full system restart, the cloud-cli server process now has ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:58598/v1/anthropic
   - Verify Smart Proxy is running on port 58598 with the updated routing (qwen3.6-plus → Fusion Server)
   - Verify Fusion Server is running on port 8899
   - Test that `/model qwen3.6-plus` in a new Claude Code session actually produces fusion deliberation output
   - User also mentioned "做一个保活代理" (make a keepalive proxy) which hasn't been addressed yet

8. Current Work:
   The core issue is making `/model qwen3.6-plus` in Claude Code route through Smart Proxy (58598) → Fusion Server (8899) instead of directly to local-ducky (58597). The strategy settled on was:
   - Keep model name as "qwen3.6-plus" (which local-ducky recognizes)
   - Relabel it as "Fusion (4模型综合审议)" in modelConstants.js
   - Smart Proxy intercepts qwen3.6-plus requests and forwards to Fusion Server
   
   The blocking issue was that the cloud-cli server process (managed by supervisord) had ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=58597 hardcoded in its environment. File changes to pouchenv.sh and .zshrc don't propagate to already-running supervisord children. The user was instructed to do a full system restart and confirmed they have done so. We need to verify the restart picked up the new environment variables and all services are running correctly.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Verify the post-restart state by checking:
   1. `cat /proc/$(pgrep -f 'node.*server/index.js' | head -1)/environ | tr '\0' '\n' | grep ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` — should show 58598
   2. Smart Proxy is running: `curl -s http://localhost:58598/health`
   3. Fusion Server is running: `curl -s http://localhost:8899/health`
   4. End-to-end test: curl Smart Proxy with model=qwen3.6-plus and verify fusion deliberation output
   
   If any service is down, restart it. If ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL is still 58597 in the process, the restart didn't pick up the pouchenv.sh change and we need another approach.
   
   Also need to address user's earlier request: "做一个保活代理" (make a keepalive proxy) to prevent Smart Proxy from dying.

  所有有效模型（Qwen、Kimi、GLM）均达成共识：安装该技能需通过 a1 工具/技能执行，而非手动在终端运行命令。分歧在于具体执行策略：Kimi
  倾向于先搜索再安装，GLM 直接使用完整 URL 安装并备选路径格式，Qwen
  提供了详细的命令参数辨析。经研判，用户已提供精确的仓库子目录链接，直接安装优于搜索；同时考虑到 Git
  仓库子目录安装可能存在解析差异，应将“完整URL直装”作为首选，“提取路径/子模块安装”作为必要备选。DeepSeek 因报错未提供有效信息，予以排除。

  a1 skill install https://code.alibaba-inc.com/claudecode/skills/tree/master/1d-platform-dev
  [g lm, qwen]

  如果上述命令因 CLI 不支持完整 Web URL 或子目录解析而失败，请使用以下备选方案（提取仓库与子路径）：

  a1 skill install claudecode/skills --path 1d-platform-dev
  # 或
  a1 skill install claudecode/skills/1d-platform-dev
  [qwen, glm]

[2026-07-01] 你是 autonomous-studio 引擎的持续自治循环（Ralph Wiggum 模式，每轮新 context）。
当前轮次：推进持久化自动开发研究管线的**一个小工作单位** 或 **一次全量深度审计**（由 audit-cycle-state 决定）。

★ 预算：不设上限（用户 2026-06-27 指示）。普通轮/瞭望轮仍守小工作单位；**全量审计轮解绑深度限制**（可读 5-15 文件、追跨模块数据流、可用 sub-agent 但必须 model=sonnet）。

步骤：
0. 读 .claude/autonomous-constraints.md 全文（DO NOT 排除项 + DO 审计指令 A/B/C/D 四节）。然后读 .claude/audit-cycle-state.json 决定**本轮类型**：
   - status=idle 或 cycle-complete → **本轮走全量审计路径**：选一个"未深度审过"的项目（看 .claude/audits/ 已有报告避免重复），深度审计（不限于 1-3 文件），产出独立 report 落 .claude/audits/audit-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN.md（不进 case JSON），把 findings 写到 audit-cycle-state.json 的 derived_fixes（每条标 kind: route-fix|direction-shift|structural）。status 改 auditing→fix-in-progress。然后本轮结束（不派生 fix，下轮起逐个派生）。
   - status=fix-in-progress → **本轮走瞭望/研究或派生 fix 路径**：先看 audit-cycle-state.derived_fixes 里有没有 status=pending 的 finding；有 → 派生一个最小 fix case（route-fix 用 opt-worktree 复用，direction-shift 触发新 worktree——opt-worktree.sh 已内置 judge_direction_kind 自动判定，只需把公共接口文件列入改动）；finding 全 pending → 跑 scout-scan 做瞭望快照（轻量，不深读源码），写 case 存档。所有派生 fix 状态变 merged|rejected 后，audit-cycle-state.status 改 cycle-complete（下轮触发新审计）。
   - status=auditing → 不应出现（审计单轮内完成），出现则降级走瞭望轮。
1. 跑 bash scripts/scout-scan.py --workspace /home/admin/workspace/autonomous-studio-aone（不带 --json，文本报告，轻）→ 拿项目健康快照（瞭望/修复轮必跑；审计轮可跳过此步直接深审）
2. 报告末尾有「推荐工作单位（按健康度排序）」——瞭望/修复轮取 #1 项目（若 #1 被 autonomous-constraints.md 排除则顺延 #2）。仍坚持小工作单位（**修复阶段** 1-3 文件）；**审计阶段** 不限深度。autonomous-studio 不被特殊排除：它若排 #1 说明真有结构性问题，该修就修；但日常自我润色不再因"最近活跃"霸榜。
3. 修复轮的最小改动（只改 1-3 个文件，不要 Read 超过 2 个源文件——**仅修复轮**；审计轮可读 5-15 文件）；不要碰 .codebase-index/ 大 JSON
4. 用 bash scripts/opt-worktree.sh commit <area:subdirection> "<说明>" <文件1> <文件2> 提交（指定文件，避免扫 WIP；禁直接 git commit main——gate 会拦）。opt-worktree.sh 已内置 direction_kind 判定：触及 .claude/public-interfaces.txt 列出的公共接口文件 → 自动开新 worktree（direction-shift）；不触及 → 复用同 area worktree（route-fix）。你不用手动决定。
5. 汇报 + 喂蒸馏闭环：做了什么 + 哪个 worktree + 下轮建议；并写一条 case 到 .claude/decisions/case-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN.json（字段：case_id/agent_id/timestamp/project/work_unit/situation/action/files_changed/worktree/direction/outcome[枚举 succeeded|failed|rolled_back|superseded]/outcome_evidence[引用可观察事实，不接受散文]/next_suggestion/**audit_type**[枚举 code-review|security-review|audit-log-instrumentation|deep-audit|none]/**audit_findings**[数组，每条 {file,line,severity,finding,remediation,kind}，无发现写 []]/**audit_id**[派生 fix 写父审计 id，非审计 case 写 null]/**audit_depth**[枚举 shallow|deep，瞭望轮=shallow，全量审计轮=deep]）。预算已解禁，case 要写实、写全。**派生 fix case 必须在 audit-cycle-state.json 的 derived_fixes 数组里同步 status=pending→merged|rejected**。
6. **回写状态**（持久化关键，否则目标无法跨 context 传递）：更新 .claude/memory/autonomous-state.md — GOAL_STATUS(active|paused|done)/ACTIVE_GOAL/LAST_UPDATED(YYYY-MM-DD)/LAST_WORKTREE/LAST_OUTCOME(done|blocked|in_progress)/NEXT_SUGGESTION(≥1 条下轮工作单位）。**同时回写 .claude/audit-cycle-state.json**（status/derived_fixes[].status/last_audit_*），不写则审计周期状态丢失。

纪律（用户定，无限制）：
- 不设冷却/连续次数上限——worktree 隔离，main 永远安全，大胆做
- 每轮聚焦一个**小**工作单位（修复轮）或**一次深度审计**（审计轮），做完就退出（while 循环重开新 context 继续）
- 全量审计轮解绑深度但解绑**仅限审计**——审计挖出的问题在派生 fix 时仍拆成最小单位走 opt-worktree
- 唯一停止：用户说停（.claude/.stop_autonomous 标记）或 kill 进程
- 卡死保护：同错误连续 3 次无进展 → 跳到下个项目
[2026-06-24] https://code.alibaba-inc.com/OneDayAI-RPUKYRO/1BfrYn9G/tree/onedaybot-dev
这个项目的admin的知识库页面和学员端的知识库页面改名字为“规则库”
[2026-06-16] agent-dashboard启动这个项目
[2026-06-16] 保持重复进程清理，我看前端页面怎么还没有变化？
[2026-06-16] This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user wants a fully functional Agent Dashboard that:
   - Automatically detects all running Claude Code terminal sessions on the machine
   - Shows real conversation content (not raw terminal output) in expandable detail panels
   - Renders Markdown properly (especially tables) in assistant messages
   - Does NOT show tool calls, only dialogue text
   - Allows sending messages that actually reach the Claude process
   - Has real-time conversation sync (sub-second)
   - Highlights/flashes cards when sessions need attention (stopped, waiting for input)
   - Sends browser push notifications when sessions need attention
   - Persists card renames across backend restarts (via Redis)
   - Doesn't respawn closed cards (persists dismissals via Redis)
   - Cleans up duplicate ttyd processes
   - All communication in Chinese
   - Currently: frontend page is not reflecting changes despite all backend modifications

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - FastAPI + Socket.IO backend on port 8091
   - React + Vite + TypeScript frontend on port 3000
   - Redis for persistence (custom names, dismissed sessions)
   - Claude Code JSONL files at `~/.claude/projects/*/UUID.jsonl` containing conversation history
   - JSONL entry types: `user`, `assistant`, `mode`, `permission-mode`, `file-history-snapshot`, `ai-title`, `system`, `attachment`, `last-prompt`, `queue-operation`
   - Assistant messages have content as list of blocks: `{type: 'text', text}` and `{type: 'tool_use', name, input}`
   - tmux sessions for monitoring Claude processes
   - ttyd for WebSocket terminal bridge
   - Sandbox URL pattern: `AONE_SANDBOX_ENDPOINT_TEMPLATE` with `{port}` placeholder → `cdfc69-sandbox-sessionc85038dc17b14873a0-{port}.agent.alibaba-inc.com`
   - Two-phase polling: lightweight `/conversation/poll` checks mtime cache, only fetches full conversation on change
   - Message injection via writing to Claude's real `/dev/pts/X` tty device
   - Browser Notification API for attention alerts
   - CSS keyframe animation `attention-pulse` for card highlighting
   - react-markdown + remark-gfm for GFM table/markdown rendering

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`backend/app/models.py`**
     - Core data models. Added `claude_session_id`, `model`, `needs_attention` fields to SessionInfo
     ```python
     class SessionInfo(BaseModel):
         sid: str
         name: str = ""
         status: Literal["active", "stopped"] = "active"
         port: int
         created_at: float = Field(default_factory=time.time)
         auto_discovered: bool = False
         claude_session_id: str | None = None
         model: str | None = None
         needs_attention: bool = False
     ```

   - **`backend/app/session_router.py`**
     - In-memory session registry. Updated `register()` to accept `claude_session_id` and `model` params.

   - **`backend/app/main.py`** — THE MOST CRITICAL FILE, heavily modified:
     - Added `_dismissed_sids` set, Redis persistence keys and helpers (`_load_persisted_state`, `_save_custom_name`, `_get_custom_name`, `_save_dismissed`)
     - Completely rewrote `_auto_discover_sessions()`: scans `ps` for Claude processes with `--session-id`/`--resume` flags, extracts full UUID and model, skips dismissed sessions, creates single ttyd per session, detects CPU < 1% for `needs_attention`
     - Added `_get_session_display_name()`: reads JSONL first user message for card title
     - Added `GET /api/sessions/{sid}/conversation`: parses JSONL, returns structured messages
     - Added `GET /api/sessions/{sid}/conversation/poll`: lightweight mtime-based cache check
     - Added `_parse_jsonl_messages()` helper and `_conv_cache` dict
     - Added `POST /api/sessions/{sid}/message`: finds Claude's real tty via ps, writes to `/dev/tty`
     - Modified `DELETE /api/sessions/{sid}`: auto-discovered sessions only hidden (added to `_dismissed_sids` + Redis), not killed
     - Modified `PATCH /api/sessions/{sid}`: saves custom name to Redis
     - Modified lifespan: loads persisted state on startup

   - **`backend/app/message_injector.py`**
     - Existing tmux send-keys injector. NOT used for Claude sessions since they run outside tmux. The new `/message` endpoint writes directly to `/dev/pts/X`.

   - **`frontend/src/lib/types.ts`**
     - Added `ConversationMessage`, `ToolCall`, `ConversationResponse` interfaces
     - Updated `SessionInfo` with `needs_attention`, `claude_session_id`, `model`
     - Updated `SessionCard` with `needsAttention`, `claudeSessionId`, `model`

   - **`frontend/src/App.tsx`**
     - Removed all DEMO_CARDS and related sessionStorage logic
     - `toSessionCard()` maps `needs_attention` to status
     - `handleSendMessage` now calls `POST /api/sessions/{sid}/message` (was just console.log)
     - Added `requestNotificationPermission()` and `sendNotification()` functions
     - Uses `prevAttentionRef` to detect newly-needing-attention sessions and send browser notifications
     - Poll interval reduced to 5000ms for session list
     - Top bar shows idle count and "需要关注" badge

   - **`frontend/src/components/AgentCard.tsx`**
     - Complete rewrite multiple times. Current state:
     - Uses ReactMarkdown + remarkGfm for assistant messages (wrapped in `<div className="md-body">`)
     - No tool_calls rendering (removed per user request)
     - Filters out messages without text: `conversation.filter((msg) => msg.text)`
     - Always-running effect fetches latest 5 messages for card summary display
     - Two-phase polling when expanded: 0.5s poll → fetch full only on change
     - Auto-scrolls to bottom via `convEndRef`
     - Card has `card-attention` CSS class + orange border when `needsAttention`
     - Shows latest message preview when collapsed (2-line clamp)

   - **`frontend/src/styles/global.css`**
     - Added `@keyframes attention-pulse` animation (orange glow, 2s cycle)
     - Added `.card-attention` class applying the animation
     - Added comprehensive `.md-body` styles for: tables (blue header, hover rows), code blocks (dark bg + blue left border), inline code, lists, headings, blockquotes, links, hr, bold/italic

   - **`frontend/vite.config.ts`**
     - Changed proxy target from port 8080 to 8091

4. Errors and Fixes:
   - **Source files missing**: Only config files existed in agent-dashboard/. Fixed by cloning from `https://gitlab.alibaba-inc.com/xtool/agent-dashboard.git`
   - **pip timeout**: PyPI unreachable. Fixed with `-i https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/`
   - **python3-venv missing**: Fixed with `sudo apt-get install python3.12-venv`
   - **Vite proxy wrong port**: Proxy pointed to 8080 but backend on 8091. Fixed in vite.config.ts
   - **Vite localhost-only**: Not accessible from sandbox URL. Fixed by restarting with `--host 0.0.0.0`
   - **Pre-existing TS errors**: ApprovalQueue, ContextTimeline, stores had type mismatches (snake_case vs camelCase). Ignored since components unused.
   - **NotificationOptions.renotify TS error**: Removed `renotify: true` from Notification constructor
   - **ttyd zombie process leak**: Discovery loop created new ttyd every 2 seconds without checking existing ones properly. Hundreds accumulated. Fixed by cleaning all with `killall ttyd` and improving discovery logic to check for existing ttyd before creating new ones.
   - **Messages not sent**: `handleSendMessage` was just `console.log`. Fixed to call POST API endpoint.
   - **Conversation not real-time**: Was reading entire JSONL every 0.5s. Fixed with two-phase polling (mtime cache check → conditional full fetch).

5. Problem Solving:
   - Solved Claude session detection by scanning `ps` for processes with `--session-id` flag
   - Solved conversation parsing by reading JSONL files from `~/.claude/projects/*/UUID.jsonl`
   - Solved message delivery by finding Claude's real tty (`/dev/pts/X`) and writing directly
   - Solved rename persistence with Redis hash storage
   - Solved close-respawn with Redis set for dismissed sessions
   - Solved performance with mtime-based caching for conversation polling
   - ONGOING: Frontend not reflecting changes - user's latest complaint
